channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada Commemorates U.S. Independence Day with Joint Military Ceremony
item.description: As the United States celebrates its 250th anniversary of independence, Canada is marking the occasion with a series of symbolic gestures to highlight its longstanding friendship with the U.S. A joint ...

item.title: Protest Against Ethanol Blending Mandate Scheduled at Jantar Mantar
item.description: A group of critics opposing the government's E20 ethanol-blending policy is set to stage a sit-in protest at Delhi's Jantar Mantar on Sunday, July 5. Organizers describe this as the first public demon...

item.title: Challenges in Achieving Britain's Green Energy Goals by 2030
item.description: The article examines the challenges Labour faces in transforming its renewable energy plans into affordable power by 2030. Despite approving double the renewable projects compared to previous governme...

item.title: Nigeria's Procurement Transparency Crisis As State Portals Collapse
item.description: A review of Nigeria's Open Contracting Data Standard (OCDS) portals reveals that many state governments have shut down or disabled these platforms, blocking public access to information on multi-billi...

item.title: Road Crash on Nakuru-Eldoret Highway Claims Seven Lives, Injuries Reported
item.description: A devastating road crash on the Nakuru-Eldoret highway claimed seven lives and left five others injured, according to eyewitness accounts and police statements. The incident, which occurred on Friday ...

item.title: Krueger advances at Wimbledon as Williams sisters withdraw from doubles match
item.description: Qualifier Ashlyn Krueger secured a significant Wimbledon victory over Ukraine’s Daria Snigur, marking her progression to the last 16 with a 6-3 6-2 win. This achievement coincided with American Indepe...

item.title: Eva Marie Saint's Early Career in the 1940s: From Radio to Television
item.description: This article explores the formative years of Eva Marie Saint during the 1940s, detailing her journey from a student at Bowling Green State University to a rising actress in New York. Born on July 4, 1...

item.title: Nigeria's Fake Agency Scandal: DG Deactivates Social Media Amid Legal Scrutiny
item.description: Adeyemi, who falsely claimed to lead a non-existent agency, has deactivated his social media accounts and websites after facing legal accusations. The government alleges he used his position to secure...

item.title: Canada's World Cup Exit Ends with Defeat to Morocco
item.description: Canada’s men’s national soccer team concluded its historic World Cup campaign with a 3-0 defeat to Morocco in Houston, marking the tournament co-hosts’ earliest exit since qualifying for the competiti...

item.title: Ammonia gas removal operation concludes at Tiruvallur seafood plant after safety measures
item.description: The Tiruvallur district administration, alongside a team of experts, successfully evacuated 60% of ammonia gas from three storage tanks at a seafood processing unit where a leak had caused fatalities ...

item.title: Trump's Alleged Strategy to Undermine His Own Party Ahead of Midterms
item.description: A Trump biographer suggests the former president is actively undermining his own party's chances in the upcoming midterms to shift blame for potential losses. Michael Wolff, a prominent Trump biograph...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding details revealed through leaked footage
item.description: The article details the leaked footage of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding held at Madison Square Garden (MSG), highlighting the event's opulence and the couple's personal touches. The footage ...

item.title: Eminem loses trademark battle over 'Swim Shady' brand
item.description: Eminem has faced a legal setback in his trademark dispute with the Australian beach brand Swim Shady. The Sydney-based company, launched in 2024 by Jeremy Scott and Elizabeth Afrakoff, was granted pro...

item.title: Simba SC Wins Federation Cup After Four-Year Drought
item.description: Simba SC ended a four-year trophy drought by defeating Azam FC 1-0 in the CRDB Federation Cup final at Gombani Stadium. The victory marks their first major domestic silverware since 2021/22 and breaks...

item.title: Springbok Women's Rugby Match Against USA: Coach Highlights First-Half Success and Second-Halftime Adjustments
item.description: The South African Springbok Women delivered a dominant first-half performance against the USA, securing a 34-21 victory at Ellis Park. Coach Swys de Bruin praised his team's attacking rugby, which lef...

item.title: Spotify investigates alleged manipulation of Malcolm Todd’s song streams
item.description: Spotify has removed over 500,000 artificial streams from Malcolm Todd’s track ‘Earrings’ following allegations of manipulation on the prediction market Kalshi. According to WIRED, traders on Kalshi ac...

item.title: Three suspects arrested over violence during Linda Mwananchi rally in Kisii
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested three individuals linked to the violent attack on the Linda Mwananchi convoy during a rally in Kisii. The suspects, Allan Masese Onyambu, ...

item.title: Microsoft's Profit Shift to Low-Tax Countries Sparks Tax Controversy
item.description: The article discusses Microsoft's strategy of shifting profits to low-tax jurisdictions like Ireland and Luxembourg to minimize its tax liability. Despite employing only 3% of its global workforce in ...

item.title: Managing Superannuation Funds Beyond the $2M Cap: Strategies for Growth and Tax Efficiency
item.description: The article addresses financial planning strategies for individuals nearing the $2 million superannuation transfer balance cap. At 59 years old, the author's superannuation balance is approaching this...

item.title: Lok Sabha to table report on Justice Yashwant Varma's case during Monsoon Session
item.description: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla announced that a probe committee's report on Justice Yashwant Varma, who faced impeachment proceedings over the recovery of burnt currency notes from his residence, will be ...
